entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain important for diets and economies in Nigeria, used in flour and high energy foods.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where sorghum production and consumption are significant.

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector of farming and agricultural commodities, currently an attractive investment.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal grain that sorghum can substitute or complement in composite flour production.

entities.name: COMPOSITE FLOUR
entities.description: A product made by combining sorghum with wheat.

entities.name: HIGH ENERGY FOODS
entities.description: Foods produced by flour mills and beverage companies using sorghum.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential minerals, specifically iron and zinc, found in sorghum.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal grain compared to sorghum for micronutrient content.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal grain compared to sorghum for micronutrient content.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output per unit of input for sorghum production.

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall output of sorghum to meet increasing demand.
